data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption protocols to secure user data during transmission and at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Controls to ensure only authorized access to systems and data.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes OAuth and 2FA for user authentication.

data.title: Security Audits and Penetration Testing
data.description: Regular security testing to identify and patch vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Internal and third-party audits and white-hat engagements.

data.title: Threat Intelligence and Monitoring
data.description: Continuous monitoring to detect and respond to security threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Advanced SIEM systems and custom-built threat intelligence tools.

data.title: Automated Security Response
data.description: Automation tools to promptly mitigate potential threats once detected.
data.technical_spec: Use of machine learning algorithms for quick incident response.
